error_message: Invariant #1 violation: the project no longer generates `deep_dive_script` or `author_episode` podcast briefs. ALL podcast output must be `series_episode` format. Per scanner/series.py + scanner/podcast.py changes after the 2026-05-19/20 unscheduled-gap incident, deepdive briefs must be hard-rejected at drain time so they cannot resurface in the day's listening rotation.
drain_decision: No script written. Friedson's series block of four episodes already aired 2026-05-16; his next scheduled re-airing in the registry is 2026-06-22 as `series_episode`. If the listener wants additional Friedson material before then, queue an `office_primer` for County Executive or wait for the 6/22 series run.
windows_side_followup: Stop the Windows-side scheduler from emitting deepdive/author briefs entirely; current emitters appear to still be live somewhere. Verify with: grep -nE "deep_dive_script|author_episode" scanner/*.py main.py
